mapper.sql: `id`, job_id jobId, job_name jobName, executor_handler executorHandler, executor_param executorParam, `status`, error_msg errorMsg, execution_time executionTime, start_time startTime, end_time endTime, create_time createTime
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_execution_log (job_id, job_name, executor_handler, executor_param, status, error_msg, execution_time, start_time, end_time) VALUES (#{jobId}, #{jobName}, #{executorHandler}, #{executorParam}, #{status}, #{errorMsg}, #{executionTime}, #{startTime}, #{endTime})
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM job_execution_log ORDER BY start_time DESC
